meta.description: Tarot card database for Daily Fortune

majorArcana.name: The Fool
majorArcana.meaning: New beginnings, innocence, spontaneity, free spirit
majorArcana.description: A fresh start awaits you. Embrace the unknown with an open heart and trust the journey ahead.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 새로운 시작이 기다리고 있습니다. 열린 마음으로 미지의 세계를 받아들이고 앞으로의 여정을 신뢰하세요.
majorArcana.advice: Take the leap of faith today. The universe supports your courage.

majorArcana.name: The Magician
majorArcana.description: You have all the tools you need. Channel your willpower and make things happen.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 당신은 필요한 모든 도구를 가지고 있습니다. 의지력을 발휘하여 일을 성사시키세요.
majorArcana.advice: Focus your energy on one goal today. Your power to create is immense.

majorArcana.name: The High Priestess
majorArcana.meaning: Intuition, sacred knowledge, divine feminine, the subconscious mind
majorArcana.reversed: Secrets, withdrawal, silence, disconnection from intuition
majorArcana.description: Trust your inner voice today. The answers you seek are already within you.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 오늘은 내면의 목소리를 믿으세요. 당신이 찾는 답은 이미 당신 안에 있습니다.
majorArcana.advice: Pause and listen to your intuition before making decisions.

majorArcana.name: The Empress
majorArcana.description: Abundance flows toward you. Nurture your projects and relationships with love.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 풍요로움이 당신에게 흐르고 있습니다. 사랑으로 프로젝트와 관계를 돌보세요.
majorArcana.advice: Surround yourself with beauty today. Create something meaningful.

majorArcana.name: The Emperor
majorArcana.description: Structure and discipline will carry you far today. Lead with wisdom.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 체계와 규율이 오늘 당신을 멀리 데려갈 것입니다. 지혜로 이끄세요.
majorArcana.advice: Set clear boundaries and organize your priorities.

majorArcana.name: The Hierophant
majorArcana.meaning: Spiritual wisdom, tradition, conformity, morality, education
majorArcana.reversed: Personal beliefs, freedom, challenging the status quo
majorArcana.description: Seek wisdom from those who came before you. Tradition holds valuable lessons.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 선조들의 지혜를 구하세요. 전통은 귀중한 교훈을 담고 있습니다.
majorArcana.advice: Learn from a mentor or revisit fundamental principles today.

majorArcana.name: The Lovers
majorArcana.meaning: Love, harmony, relationships, values alignment, choices
majorArcana.description: A meaningful connection deepens today. Honor the bonds that matter most.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 의미 있는 연결이 오늘 깊어집니다. 가장 중요한 유대를 소중히 하세요.
majorArcana.advice: Make choices aligned with your heart, not just your head.

majorArcana.name: The Chariot
majorArcana.description: Victory is within reach. Stay focused and charge forward with determination.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 승리가 손에 닿을 곳에 있습니다. 집중하고 결단력으로 전진하세요.
majorArcana.advice: Push through obstacles today. Your willpower is unstoppable.

majorArcana.name: Strength
majorArcana.description: True strength comes from gentleness. Face challenges with calm courage.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 진정한 힘은 부드러움에서 나옵니다. 차분한 용기로 도전을 맞이하세요.
majorArcana.advice: Be gentle with yourself and others. Patience is your superpower.

majorArcana.name: The Hermit
majorArcana.meaning: Soul-searching, introspection, being alone, inner guidance
majorArcana.description: Take time for solitude and reflection. The light you seek shines from within.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 고독과 성찰의 시간을 가지세요. 당신이 찾는 빛은 내면에서 빛나고 있습니다.
majorArcana.advice: Spend quiet time alone today. Answers emerge in silence.

majorArcana.name: Wheel of Fortune
majorArcana.meaning: Good luck, karma, life cycles, destiny, turning point
majorArcana.reversed: Bad luck, resistance to change, breaking cycles
majorArcana.description: The wheel is turning in your favor. Embrace change and trust the cycle.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 수레바퀴가 당신에게 유리하게 돌아가고 있습니다. 변화를 받아들이고 순환을 신뢰하세요.
majorArcana.advice: Be open to unexpected opportunities. Luck is on your side.

majorArcana.name: Justice
majorArcana.meaning: Justice, fairness, truth, cause and effect, law
majorArcana.description: Truth and balance prevail. Act with integrity and fairness in all dealings.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 진실과 균형이 승리합니다. 모든 일에서 성실함과 공정함으로 행동하세요.
majorArcana.advice: Make fair decisions today. What you give comes back to you.

majorArcana.name: The Hanged Man
majorArcana.meaning: Surrender, letting go, new perspectives, pause
majorArcana.description: Sometimes the best action is inaction. Shift your perspective and see anew.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 때로는 최선의 행동은 무위입니다. 관점을 바꾸고 새롭게 보세요.
majorArcana.advice: Let go of control today. A new angle will reveal the solution.

majorArcana.name: Death
majorArcana.reversed: Resistance to change, fear of letting go
majorArcana.description: An ending makes way for a beautiful new beginning. Transform with grace.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 끝남은 아름다운 새로운 시작을 위한 길을 만듭니다. 우아하게 변화하세요.
majorArcana.advice: Release what no longer serves you. Rebirth follows every ending.

majorArcana.name: Temperance
majorArcana.reversed: Imbalance, excess, lack of long-term vision
majorArcana.description: Find your center through balance and moderation. Patience brings perfection.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 균형과 절제를 통해 중심을 찾으세요. 인내가 완벽함을 가져옵니다.
majorArcana.advice: Practice moderation in all things today. Harmony is your goal.

majorArcana.name: The Devil
majorArcana.meaning: Shadow self, attachment, addiction, restriction, sexuality
majorArcana.reversed: Releasing limiting beliefs, exploring dark thoughts, detachment
majorArcana.description: Recognize what chains you. You have the power to break free at any time.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 무엇이 당신을 묶고 있는지 인식하세요. 언제든지 자유로워질 힘이 있습니다.
majorArcana.advice: Identify one habit holding you back and take a step to change it.

majorArcana.name: The Tower
majorArcana.meaning: Sudden change, upheaval, chaos, revelation, awakening
majorArcana.reversed: Fear of change, avoiding disaster, delaying the inevitable
majorArcana.description: What falls apart was never built to last. From the rubble, build stronger.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 무너지는 것은 결코 오래가도록 만들어진 것이 아닙니다. 잔해에서 더 강하게 세우세요.
majorArcana.advice: Don't fear disruption today. Breakthroughs come from breakdowns.

majorArcana.name: The Star
majorArcana.description: Hope shines brightly today. You're exactly where you need to be.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 오늘 희망이 밝게 빛납니다. 당신은 정확히 있어야 할 곳에 있습니다.
majorArcana.advice: Renew your faith in yourself. The stars are aligned in your favor.

majorArcana.name: The Moon
majorArcana.reversed: Release of fear, repressed emotion, inner confusion
majorArcana.description: Not everything is as it seems. Trust your intuition through the shadows.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 모든 것이 보이는 대로인 것은 아닙니다. 그림자 속에서도 직감을 믿으세요.
majorArcana.advice: Don't rush to judgment. Let things reveal themselves naturally.

majorArcana.name: The Sun
majorArcana.reversed: Inner child blocked, overly optimistic, temporary setback
majorArcana.description: Joy and warmth fill your day. Celebrate life and share your light!
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 기쁨과 따뜻함이 당신의 하루를 채웁니다. 삶을 축하하고 빛을 나누세요!
majorArcana.advice: Radiate positivity today. Your energy uplifts everyone around you.

majorArcana.name: Judgement
majorArcana.reversed: Self-doubt, inner critic, ignoring the call
majorArcana.description: A higher calling beckons. Rise to your potential and answer the call.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 더 높은 부름이 손짓합니다. 잠재력을 발휘하고 부름에 응답하세요.
majorArcana.advice: Reflect on your true purpose. It's time for a personal renaissance.

majorArcana.name: The World
majorArcana.description: A cycle completes beautifully. Celebrate your journey and prepare for the next.
majorArcana.descriptionKo: 한 순환이 아름답게 완성됩니다. 여정을 축하하고 다음을 준비하세요.
majorArcana.advice: Acknowledge how far you've come. You've earned this moment.

fortuneMessages: 오늘 예상치 못한 기쁨이 찾아옵니다. — An unexpected joy visits you today.
작은 친절이 큰 변화를 만듭니다. — A small kindness creates a big change.
기다리던 소식이 곧 도착합니다. — The news you've been waiting for arrives soon.
용기를 내면 길이 열립니다. — Courage opens the path ahead.
오늘의 만남이 내일의 인연이 됩니다. — Today's encounter becomes tomorrow's connection.
마음의 평화가 최고의 보물입니다. — Peace of mind is the greatest treasure.
새로운 도전이 성장의 씨앗입니다. — A new challenge is the seed of growth.
당신의 미소가 누군가의 하루를 밝힙니다. — Your smile brightens someone's day.
직감을 믿으세요. 답은 이미 알고 있습니다. — Trust your instinct. You already know the answer.
오늘은 새로운 습관을 시작하기 좋은 날입니다. — Today is a good day to start a new habit.
나누는 것이 받는 것보다 더 큰 기쁨입니다. — Giving brings greater joy than receiving.
흐르는 물처럼 유연하게 대처하세요. — Be flexible like flowing water.
준비된 자에게 행운이 찾아옵니다. — Fortune favors the prepared.
오늘 하루, 감사한 일 세 가지를 찾아보세요. — Find three things to be grateful for today.
당신의 노력은 반드시 결실을 맺습니다. — Your efforts will surely bear fruit.
변화를 두려워하지 마세요. 성장의 시작입니다. — Don't fear change. It's the beginning of growth.
가까운 사람에게 따뜻한 말 한마디를 건네세요. — Offer a warm word to someone close.
지금 이 순간이 가장 소중합니다. — This moment right now is the most precious.
실패는 성공의 다른 이름입니다. — Failure is just another name for success.
창의력이 빛나는 하루가 될 것입니다. — Creativity will shine brightly today.
어제보다 나은 오늘을 만들어 가세요. — Make today better than yesterday.
좋은 사람들과 함께하면 좋은 일이 생깁니다. — Good things happen when you're with good people.
